custom_branding.label: Custom colors & branding
custom_branding.upgrade_message: Upgrade to match your site's colors and style.

email_capture.label: Email capture & lead generation
email_capture.upgrade_message: Collect visitor emails and send result summaries directly to them.

result_notifications.label: Admin result notifications
result_notifications.upgrade_message: Get notified by email whenever a visitor completes the wizard.

csv_export.label: CSV export
csv_export.upgrade_message: Export your wizard configuration to CSV for backup or editing.

csv_import.label: CSV import
csv_import.upgrade_message: Import wizard configuration from a CSV file to save setup time.

json_io.label: JSON import & export
json_io.upgrade_message: Full JSON import/export — ideal for templating across multiple installs.

analytics_basic.label: Basic analytics
analytics_basic.upgrade_message: See completion rates and which plans visitors are matched to most.

analytics_full.label: Full analytics & reporting
analytics_full.upgrade_message: Cross-platform analytics, drop-off tracking, and monthly strategy reports.

white_label.label: White-label (remove badge)
white_label.upgrade_message: Remove the 'Powered by Guidwell' badge for client sites.

email_integrations.label: Email integrations (Mailchimp, ConvertKit)
email_integrations.upgrade_message: Connect results directly to your email marketing platform.

unlimited_wizards.label: Unlimited active wizards
unlimited_wizards.upgrade_message: Create a separate wizard for each service or audience segment.

multi_site.label: Multi-site licensing
multi_site.upgrade_message: Use Guidwell on up to 3 sites (Pro) or unlimited sites (Agency).
